name: Recipe Organizer
description: Save, organize, and browse your favorite recipes with ingredients, steps, and cook times.
ai_context: This is a React + Vite recipe organizer. Single-file App.jsx contains all logic. Features: browse recipes as cards (gradient placeholders for images), full recipe detail view (ingredients list with servings scaler, numbered steps, prep/cook time, difficulty, dietary tags), add/edit recipes via modal form, category filter (All/Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner/Snacks/Desserts), search by name or ingredients, 4 sample recipes pre-loaded. All data persisted in localStorage. CSS custom properties in App.css for theming. The user will likely ask to: add photo uploads, add meal planning calendar, add shopping list generator, add nutritional info, add recipe sharing, import from URLs, add cooking timers, add ratings/favorites, connect to recipe APIs, etc.
